response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and skilled software engineer with over 15 years of experience and a strong background in full-stack development, cloud-native technologies, and infrastructure. His recent work at Google in AI-agent infrastructure is directly relevant, and his initiative in creating open-source projects and leading workshops demonstrates thought leadership. However, his experience appears more focused on hands-on implementation rather than the high-level, director-level strategic planning and customer advisory required by this role. His current "Staff" title is also a level below the "Principal" target, raising questions about his readiness for the strategic and influential scope of the position.
strengths: Extensive (15+ years) and diverse software engineering experience across multiple domains.
Demonstrated initiative and leadership through founding open-source projects, giving technical talks, and creating workshops.
Recent, hands-on experience with relevant AI infrastructure and tooling at a top-tier tech company.
concerns: Experience seems heavily weighted towards implementation and craftsmanship rather than high-level AI strategy and product vision.
Current seniority level ("Staff Engineer") is below the director-level "Principal Engineer" specified in the job description.
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers or defining the future state of large-scale commercial products.
